result.summary: Salesforce engineering is organized into 6 major product pillars (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Platform, Data Cloud, Marketing, and Einstein AI) with approximately 12,000 engineers reporting through SVP-level pillar leads to the CTO office.
key_findings: Engineering org restructured in 2024 to consolidate AI efforts under a unified Einstein AI pillar with 1,500+ dedicated engineers
Platform team is the largest pillar (~3,200 engineers) responsible for core infrastructure, Hyperforce, and multi-tenant architecture
Each pillar operates semi-autonomously with own release cycles, though shared platform services create cross-team dependencies averaging 2-3 sprint delays
